response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and appropriate seniority with 20+ years of experience, this role requires deep expertise in GPU architecture, AI accelerator optimization, and hardware-software co-design—domains completely absent from their resume. Their experience is firmly in full-stack application development, web systems, and infrastructure tooling, with no background in SoC/IP modeling, deep-learning workload analysis, or hardware performance optimization.
strengths: 20+ years of software development with multiple Staff/Senior roles demonstrates appropriate seniority level
Proven expertise in systems-level performance optimization and low-latency application design (Dunnhumby, caching and high-performance databases)
Strong engineering discipline with emphasis on testing, CI/CD, and architectural thinking across diverse technical domains
concerns: Zero experience with GPU architecture, AI accelerators, or deep-learning workload optimization—the core focus of this role
No background in SoC/IP modeling, hardware performance analysis, or hardware-software co-design
All career experience is in application-layer and infrastructure software, not hardware architecture or low-level performance optimization

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware design experience
Appropriate seniority level for Principal role
